ddls:
CREATE TABLE "recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the beer recipe */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the beer */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the brew */,
  "volume_units" TEXT /* Units of the volume measurement (e.g., gallons) */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume percentage */,
  "fg" REAL /* Final gravity measurement */,
  "ibu" INTEGER /* International Bitterness Units */,
  "og" REAL /* Original gravity measurement */,
  "srm" INTEGER /* Standard Reference Method for color */,
  "boil_time" INTEGER /* Boil time duration */,
  "boil_time_units" TEXT /* Units of the boil time measurement */,
  "meets_guidelines" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe meets specific guidelines */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the recipe page */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the recipe */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recipe was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the recipe */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the recipe was last modified */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the recipe */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of ingredients for the recipe */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fermentables" (
  "fermentable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fermentable ingredient entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the fermentable ingredient used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the ingredient */,
  "amount_unit" TEXT /* Units of the ingredient amount (e.g., lb, kg) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the fermentable (e.g., malt, sugar) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the fermentable */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the fermentable */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the fermentable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fermentable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fermentables_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hops" (
  "hop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hop entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "hop_name" TEXT /* Name of the hop used */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the hop */,
  "amount_unit" TEXT /* Units of the hop amount (e.g., oz, g) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the hop (e.g., bittering, aroma) */,
  "alpha_acids" REAL /* Alpha acid percentage of the hop */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the hop */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the hop */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the hop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hops_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yeast" (
  "yeast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yeast entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "yeast_name" TEXT /* Name of the yeast used */,
  "generic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the yeast is a generic type */,
  "attenuation" REAL /* Attenuation percentage of the yeast */,
  "temperature_range_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature range for the yeast */,
  "temperature_range_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature range for the yeast */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the yeast */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the yeast */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the yeast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yeast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yeast_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extras" (
  "extra_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extra ingredient entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "extra_name" TEXT /* Name of the extra ingredient */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the extra ingredient */,
  "amount_unit" TEXT /* Units of the extra ingredient amount (e.g., oz, g) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the extra (e.g., spice, fruit) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the extra */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the extra */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the extra */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extra_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extras_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brewing_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brewing process entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the brewing process */,
  "process_description" TEXT /* Description of the brewing step */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the brewing step */,
  "duration_units" TEXT /* Units of duration (e.g., min, hours) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the brewing step */,
  "temperature_units" TEXT /* Units of temperature (e.g., °C, °F) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the brewing step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brewing_processes_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., brewer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_recipes" (
  "user_recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-recipe association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user managing the recipe */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe being managed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recipes_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recipes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe version entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the recipe */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current active version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_versions_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the recipe has received */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the recipe */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated recipe */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who marked the recipe as favorite */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipe that was marked as favorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES recipes ("recipe_id")
)
